backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the logo replacement feature across Layout.tsx and Home.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including styling, components, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for home, products, order, and contact pages wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive layout with sticky header displaying Parwati Dairy logo, Hindi tagline, desktop/mobile navigation, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing authenticated/anonymous backend actor creation with identity-based invalidation and refetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity authentication provider and hook managing login, logout, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks to interact with backend; currently contains only an example hook template.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS with warm dairy-themed OKLCH color palette (creamy whites, warm oranges, earth tones) and Noto Sans Devanagari font support for Hindi text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point wrapping App with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page component displaying Parwati Dairy's location (Ramnagar, Hazaribagh), phone numbers (8553965714 primary, 6205017829), and business hours with styled cards using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring hero section with logo, navigation buttons for Milk/Paneer/Ghee orders and Contact, plus a features section highlighting quality, freshness, and delivery benefits.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component with validation for name, phone, address, product selection (Milk/Paneer/Ghee with prices), and quantity fields that submits orders via WhatsApp integration.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page displaying three dairy items (Milk ₹60/L, Paneer ₹400/Kg, Ghee ₹1500/Kg) in a grid layout with hero image, descriptions, and order buttons linking to the order form.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility function that formats order data into a WhatsApp message and opens WhatsApp Web/app to send the order to phone number 918553965714.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography with Hindi font support (Noto Sans Devanagari), custom shadows, and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a Parwati Dairy mobile app with WhatsApp ordering integration, bilingual support, and features for milk/paneer/ghee orders. Contains architectural notes, existing features, requirements, and image specifications for a mobile-first dairy product ordering system.
